response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:21: Identified performance by four VTubers of "Ao no Sumika" (Kitani Tatsuya). Searched and retrieved full lyrics. 2. 02:22-04:54: Talk segment by AZKi, no music.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a VTuber concert performance of the song "Ao no Sumika" by four VTubers, followed by a talk segment by one of the performers, AZKi.

scenes.description: Four VTubers (Aki Rosenthal, AZKi, Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan) perform a song titled "Ao no Sumika" on stage. The stage features heart-shaped decorations and blue lighting.
scenes.performer_in_video: AZKi, Aki Rosenthal, Momosuzu Nene, Shishiro Botan
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
昼下がり、じメつく風の季節は
想い馳せる、まだ何者でもなかった僕らの肖像
何もかも分かり合えたはずだった
あの日から少しずつ
君と違う僕という呪いが肥っていく

きみの笑顔の奥の憂いを
見落としたこと、悔やみ尽くして

徒花と咲いて散っていきみに
さよなら
今でも青が棲んでいる
今でも青は澄んでいる
どんな祈りも言葉も
近づけるのに、届かなかった
まるで、静かな恋のような
頬を伝った夏のような色のなか
きみを呪う言葉が
ずっと喉の奥につかえてる
「また会えるよね」って、声にならない声
無限に膨張する銀河の星の粒のように
指の隙間を零れた
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The season of sticky wind in the early afternoon
Thinking back, a portrait of us who were still nobodies
We should have been able to understand everything
Little by little, from that day on
The curse of me being different from you started to grow

Regretting that I missed
The sorrow hidden behind your smile

Blooming and scattering like a sterile flower, to you
Goodbye
Even now, blue resides within
Even now, blue is clear
No matter what prayer or word
Even if I get close, it never reached you
Just like a quiet love
In the color of summer that ran down my cheek
The words that curse you
Are still stuck deep in my throat
"We'll meet again, right?" A voice that couldn't be spoken
Like the grains of stars in an infinitely expanding galaxy
It slipped through the gaps in my fingers

scenes.description: The main performer, AZKi, talks to the audience about the performance and the concert theme.
